name: workspace_manager
description: Load workspace files (domain context, workflows, learned knowledge). Use batch_read for the initial load — pass all needed paths in one call. Use read for single files mid-conversation. Use list for learned knowledge categories.

action.description: Action: read (single file), batch_read (multiple files in one call), or list (learned knowledge entries)

path.description: Relative path for read action, e.g. domains/finance/context.md

paths.description: Array of relative paths for batch_read action, e.g. ["domains/finance/context.md", "domains/finance/workflows/payment-chase.md", "learned/active/company.md"]

category.description: Knowledge category for list action. Omit to list all categories.
